dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I need someone from outside {location} for this. Someone with no loyalties here, no bias.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} has been making secret trips {location_hint} every week. Won't say where, won't say why, comes back with dirt under their nails and a guilty look. The whole settlement is whispering. I confronted them and they laughed it off, but I saw them hiding {quest_item} in a locked chest in their workshop. That's not something an honest person does. I think they're stockpiling supplies to sell behind our backs while the rest of us scrape by.
dialogueChunks.outro: I need proof before I go to the council. Follow their trail, find out what they're doing, and bring me evidence.

playerResponses.text: I'll find out the truth, whatever it is.
Spying on your neighbor? This feels wrong. But I'll look.
Sort out your own grudges. I'm not getting involved.

dialogueChunks.intro: Something isn't right in {location}, {player_name}, and I think I'm the only one who sees it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The new cook, {target_npc}, arrived two months ago and suddenly everyone loves them. Best food in the settlement, they say. Generous portions, fair prices. But I've noticed something nobody else has: the quality of {quest_item} in my own pantry has been dropping ever since they arrived. Shipments that used to come to me are being redirected. I think {target_npc} is buying out the suppliers {location_hint} and cornering the market, then selling at a loss to drive me under. The {enemy_type} on the trade roads are making it impossible for me to verify in person.
dialogueChunks.outro: I built this business over ten years. I'm not going to lose it to someone's scheme without a fight.

playerResponses.text: Competition can be cutthroat. I'll look into the supply chain.
Or maybe they're just a better cook. But fine, I'll check.
Business disputes aren't my area. Work it out yourselves.

dialogueChunks.intro: I've been losing sleep over this, {player_name}. Tossing and turning every night, running the same thoughts in circles.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: My oldest friend, {target_npc}, has been meeting with traders from outside {location} in secret. I found a ledger in the tavern with entries I don't recognize: large quantities of {quest_item} marked 'outbound' with no buyer listed. When I asked about it, they changed the subject and started avoiding me. The meetings happen {location_hint}, always at odd hours, and the {enemy_type} activity in the area means nobody else goes out that way to notice. Something is wrong, and I can feel it in my bones.
dialogueChunks.outro: I don't want to believe the worst about someone I've known my whole life. But the evidence is piling up. Please, find out the truth.

playerResponses.text: I'll follow the trail and get you answers.
Have you tried just talking to them honestly?
Suspicion can poison a friendship faster than any betrayal. Leave me out of it.
